text.text: Lunar Orichalcum Ore is a rare variant of Copper Ore, appearing from time to time in place of ordinary copper throughout the Overworld. It is no mere copper, but copper steeped in the power of the moon
It generates in specific biomes including Dripstone Caves, Grove, Snowy Slopes, Jagged Peaks, Frozen Peaks, and Stony Peaks between Y=32 and Y=96.
